Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kymberly J. Aleem-Duncan, Philip M Anderson & Associates, appearing for defendant, Carla Kathryn Co, Telephone 925-255-6838 (appearance by CourtCall);
No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CARLA CO'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests Request For Monetary Sanctions is Granted. Sanctions are awarded against plaintiff in the amount of $580.00. Prevailing party to prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem Stephanie Krmpotic; Clerk: William Trupek; Not Reported, (302/JPT)
